title: Drift Normalized Review Finding
description: Schema for review findings after normalization by scripts/normalize_findings.py.

location.description: File path with optional :line suffix, or a fully qualified symbol.

reproduction.description: How a reviewer can observe the finding (command, steps, or diff pointer).

proposed_action.description: Concrete next step that resolves or mitigates the finding.

free_text.description: Optional reviewer prose for nuance that does not fit the structured slots.
